name: Generate CODE insights from relationship log

events.text: Had deep conversation with partner about goals
Missed friends birthday — forgot to check calendar
Family dinner was great, kids happy
Colleague asked for help, said yes but overwhelmed

insights: Capture: Quality time with partner and family is high-value activity
Organize: Calendar system failed — birthday reminders need improvement
Distill: Saying yes to everything leads to overwhelm; need boundaries
Express: Set up automated birthday reminders and practice saying no
